summary: Regression test pass after filter additions + refactor. Backend pytest 11/11 PASSED. /api/seed produced exactly 25 users, 4 projects, 16 activities, 167 time entries; my_activity_ids in {3,4,5}, favorite_activity_ids = 2 per user. /api/overview returns all 8 expected keys (week_start_date, total_hours, total_users, users_saved, users_with_entries, missing_users, saved_percent, breakdown) with 5 breakdown rows (4 projects + Programniveau). Time-entry upsert verified idempotent; save-week sets saved=true; copy-previous shifts dates +7 and clones values. Activity CRUD works for both project (with project_id) and program (project_id=null) levels. Frontend: Mine aktiviteter has both data-testid='mine-level-filters' (filter-all/project/program) and data-testid='mine-status-filters' (status-filter-all/open/upcoming/closed) and they combine with AND logic (verified: 13 rows -> 9 with level=project -> 2 with project+upcoming). Administration has both data-testid='admin-level-filters' (admin-level-filter-all/project/program) and data-testid='admin-status-filters' (admin-filter-all/open/upcoming/closed); AND-combo verified (program -> 5 rows, program+closed -> 1 row). Indtast timer cell edit accepts decimal comma, Tab moves focus to next testid cell, week-total updates reactively (29.5 -> 42.5 after edit), Gem uge -> 'Gemt for ugen'. No regressions.

minor.issue: Carried over from iteration 1: when destination week already has saved=true entries, merge sets saved=false on pre-existing rows. Behavioral note only.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py refactor split aggregation into _empty_project_total/_accumulate_entries/_build_breakdown and seed into _build_demo_* helpers - clean, single-responsibility, no behavior change observed.
_assign_my_activities uses random.seed(7) so test_users_list and test_overview remain deterministic - good.
Code now uses 'import random' mid-file with noqa:E402 - acceptable but a top-level import would be cleaner.
MineAktiviteter.jsx and Administration.jsx now declare LEVEL_FILTERS + STATUS_FILTERS at module scope and apply both with AND - implementation matches spec.
IndtastTimer.handleCellChange now prebuilds the merged value before passing it into setEntries' functional updater, avoiding setSavingMap inside another setState - correctly addressed.
test_credentials: No auth. User switched via data-testid='user-select-trigger'.
seed_data_creation: Re-seeded via POST /api/seed during validation; counts confirmed (25/4/16/167).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All filter testids verified live: mine-level-filters/{filter-all,filter-project,filter-program}, mine-status-filters/{status-filter-all,status-filter-open,status-filter-upcoming,status-filter-closed}, admin-level-filters/{admin-level-filter-all,admin-level-filter-project,admin-level-filter-program}, admin-status-filters/{admin-filter-all,admin-filter-open,admin-filter-upcoming,admin-filter-closed}. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_tidsregistrering.py is idempotent and uses future-dated weeks. /api/overview now also returns users_with_entries (already in iteration-1 baseline but explicit in new shape).
